title: Icy Coal
description: The direct opposite to Spicy Coal.
body:
Icy Coal for 1.15.1 and higher requires CoalAPI! Download it here

 

Icy Coal is the direct opposite to Spicy Coal. It only smelts 4 items and can be found on the surface. It cannot be made into torches. The only item it can craft is an Icy Sword, which doesn't do much damage, but that's easily made up by the fact that it slows your enemies for about half a second on each hit, but the sword breaks fast. You can also right click with the sword in hand to extinguish yourself (as long as you're not affected by the Cursed Inferno potion effect from spicy coal). The blocks in the mod are cosmetic except for the Icy Ingot Block, which is used to craft the sword.

 

Made with MCreator (mcreator.net).

 

I have a discord for these mods now: Klick!

KrokoOnAir´s Discord: Klick!
